---
title: "Our New Mistress, or, Changes at Brookfield Earl. By Charlotte M. Yonge."
---

## Our New Mistress, or, Changes at Brookfield Earl. By Charlotte M. Yonge.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1888
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** National Society’s Depository, Broad Sanctuary, London.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
